Lettre à ma mère 1/7 Il y a un an, je pouvais à peine me payer un sachet de raviole. J’ai pris deux taf alimentaires et j’ai porté l’histoire ratée de ma vie d’artiste. Et ça a cartonné. Le succès m’a sorti de la galère, mais il ne m’a pas rendu libre… Alors cette année, j’ai décidé de réaliser mes rêves et de partir voir l’Italie, en Toscane, la terre de mes ancêtres, pour y retrouver une partie de moi-même.  Là-bas, j’ai écrit chaque jour une lettre à ma mère italienne, dans cette série de 7 vidéos, publiées chaque jour. Suivez-les de près, car ce voyage va sûrement changer votre vie comme il a changé la mienne… À demain 🇮🇹 #Italie #Toscana #cinematok #traveldiaries #cinematicvideo

Hoy no solo salimos a tomar fotografías; salimos a encontrarnos con el arte en las cosas más simples. Cada conversación, cada risa, cada rincón y cada rayo de luz parecían recordarnos que la belleza no siempre está en los grandes escenarios, sino en la forma en que decidimos mirar el mundo. La cámara fue solo una herramienta; lo verdaderamente importante fue la intención de convertir un instante común en algo que pudiera permanecer cuando el tiempo siguiera su camino. . . . #cinematic #photography #peru🇵🇪 #portrait #ancash

Released on this day in Japan, Pokémon: Arceus and the Jewel of Life is the twelfth Pokémon film.  Released in 2009, it concludes the Diamond & Pearl trilogy, tying together the stories of Dialga, Palkia, and Giratina. The plot follows Ash, Pikachu, and friends as they travel back in time with the help of Dialga to prevent the legendary Pokémon Arceus from destroying the world, as it seeks to reclaim the “Jewel of Life” it once lent to the town of Michina. The film involves time travel, ancient legends, and a race against destiny to correct a past betrayal.  Definitely an unforgettable trilogy.  #pokemon #pokemongo #pokémon #nintendo #pokemoncommunity

This is England’s most heartbreaking beach. 💔 If you’ve watched Atonement, you’ll probably recognise this place. Cuckmere Haven, beneath the iconic Seven Sisters cliffs, was one of the filming locations for the award-winning film. Its dramatic coastline became the backdrop for one of cinema’s most emotional stories, making it one of England’s most recognisable yet underrated beaches. Even if you’ve never seen the film, this is a place worth visiting. The chalk cliffs, winding river and unspoilt beach create one of the most breathtaking landscapes in the UK. 📍 Cuckmere Haven, Seven Sisters Country Park 🚆 Take a train from London Victoria to Seaford (or Eastbourne), then catch the 12, 12A or 13X Coaster bus to Seven Sisters Country Park. From there, it’s an easy walk to Cuckmere Haven and the famous white cliffs. ✨ Don’t miss: • Cuckmere Haven beach • The Seven Sisters viewpoint • The walk along the cliff tops • Sunset over the English Channel Save this for your next day trip from London. #sevensisters #cuckmerehaven #daytripsfromlondon #visitengland #uktravel

caption: Tutti i posti da salvare a Chongqing 👇🏻 Se questo reel ti ha fatto dire “ma dove cavolo è questo posto?”… ecco la guida completa con tutti i luoghi che hai visto (e anche qualcuno in più) 👇🏻 LUOGHI ICONICI 🚝 Liziba Train (il treno che passa dentro al palazzo) 🏙️ Kuixing Building (la piazza dove sei sia al 1º che al 20º piano) 🏮 Hongya Cave (il palazzo illuminato stile fantasy) 🌉 Jiangbeizui Park (vista perfetta su Hongya Cave) 🌇 Raffles City (top al tramonto) 👁️ Eye Observatory (~6€ per vista dall’alto) 🚁 Drone show (vista migliore: Landmark Riverside Park) ⸻ 🏮 QUARTIERI STORICI & ATMOSFERE 🏘️ Ciqikou Ancient Town 🧱 Shibati (contrasto pazzesco tra antico e moderno) 🏮 Longmenhao Ancient Street 🛤️ Xiahao Lane (super autentica) 🌇 Danzishi Old Street (storico + skyline) ⸻ 🍜 CIBO & ESPERIENZE 🔥 Bayi Road Street Food 🥩 丁老头烤肉 (ristorante nascosto con vista incredibile) 🍵 Chen’anjian Jiaotong Tea House 陈安健交通茶馆 (solo locali, esperienza vera) ⸻ 🌿 LUOGHI PARTICOLARI 🌳 The Ring Shopping Mall (foresta dentro un centro commerciale) 🌉 Nanbin Road (lungofiume con skyline assurdo) ⸻ 🏨 HOTEL PARTICOLARI 🛁 ISEYA Panoramic Hotel (Chongqing Jiefangbei Flagship) la camera che vedi nel video è la Baroque Tower - 270° Panoramic Deluxe Suite. La trovi su Trip.com ⸻ ✨ EXTRA DA NON PERDERE 🚡 Yangtze River Cableway (funivia sopra il fiume) 🌄 Eling Park (uno dei viewpoint migliori) 🎬 Chongqing 1949 (spettacolo con 200+ artisti e palco che si muove) ⸻ 💾 Salva questo post per il tuo viaggio in Cina 💬 e scrivimi se hai bisogno di più info 😊 #travel #china #curiosità #viaggi

My mum couldn’t believe her iPhone 16 Pro can shoot this... 🤯 The truth is, if you have an iPhone 15 Pro or newer Pro model, your phone is hiding a literal cinema camera feature 🤫  What is Apple Log? When you shoot normal video, your iPhone bakes in the colors, contrast, and sharpness automatically. But when you turn on Apple Log, it saves a completely flat, desaturated video profile. It looks gray and washed out at first, but it preserves all the extra details in the highlights and shadows. This gives you total creative control to colour grade it later. How to get the cinematic look instantly: 1️⃣ Download the free Blackmagic Cam app from the App Store. 2️⃣ Go to settings and choose Codec - H.265 (save storage space) then in colour space choose Apple Log.  3️⃣ Import a custom LUT (i have one linked in my bio if you’re interested) right into the app. You can preview the final, graded cinematic look on your screen while you’re recording, or bake in the LUT, completely skipping the heavy editing process later. Have you tried shooting in Apple Log? #shotoniphone #applelog #iphone17pro #colorgrading

In 1976... Belgian filmmaker Jean-Pierre Dutilleux traveled to the remote rainforests of Papua New Guinea. During the expedition... He filmed members of the Toulambi people. In one of the documentary's most famous scenes... He handed them a small mirror. The footage appeared to show reactions ranging from surprise and curiosity to laughter. The clip became one of the most widely shared moments in exploration history. However... Some researchers have questioned whether the encounter represented a true "first contact" and have debated how the events were presented in the documentary. Even today... The footage continues to spark discussion about anthropology, indigenous cultures, and documentary filmmaking. Disclaimer: This video is based on a documented film, but aspects of the encounter remain debated by researchers. It is shared for educational and documentary purposes. #History #Anthropology #PapuaNewGuinea #Documentary #TrueStory

I thought my DJI Osmo Pocket 3 was already enough for travel… until I tried the new DJI Pocket 4P. The biggest upgrade for me is the flexibility: wide shots for places, 60mm portraits for people, better handling in tricky light, 4K slow motion for travel B-roll, and D-Log 2 if you want more room to color grade ✨ Basically, it still fits in a tiny setup, but the footage feels more polished and cinematic. For everyday clips, a phone is still convenient. But for travel shots I want to feel more intentional? This is the kind of camera I’d reach for! Won’t you agree?   ⚠️Comment “4P” for more info on the newest DJI Pocket 4P! - - - #DJIPocket4P #vlogcamera #digitalcamera #pocketcamera #camerarecommendation
